hero.body: We manufacture high-density expanded polystyrene (EPS) products at our plant in Chiclayo, Peru. Specialists in thermal insulation, lightweight roof void formers and high-performance construction panels.

products.heading: Specialized Production Lines
products.sub: We supply 100% virgin EPS adapted to national and international technical standards.

items.title: EPS Panels
items.desc: EPS boards in densities from 10 to 30 kg/m³, standard size 1.20 × 2.40 m, for insulation, joints and partitions.

items.title: Roof Void Formers
items.desc: EPS roof blocks for lightweight slabs: reduce up to 80 kg/m² and replace 4 clay bricks each.

items.title: EPS Beads
items.desc: Expanded polystyrene beads, 100% virgin material, for lightweight concrete and mix lightening.

specCards.title: Our Expanded Polystyrene Panels
specCards.note: Custom sizes available depending on order volume.

specCards.title: Our Roof Void Formers at a Glance
specCards.note: EPS void formers replace 4 clay bricks each.

construction.body: Using EPS in civil construction optimizes time and costs. Our building systems offer unmatched technical advantages.

benefits.title: Structural Lightness
benefits.desc: Reduces slab weight by up to 80 kg/m².

insulation.body: Our EPS insulation solutions guarantee temperature control in critical environments.
insulation.card1desc: High density (20-30 kg/m³) to avoid thermal bridges.
insulation.card2desc: Acoustic comfort and thermal stability in extreme climates.

items.q: What EPS panel densities do you manufacture?
items.a: We manufacture EPS panels in 7 densities: 10, 12, 15, 18, 20, 25 and 30 kg/m³, standard size 1.20 × 2.40 m. Special sizes are available depending on order volume.

items.q: How much weight does an EPS void former save?
items.a: EPS void formers can reduce slab loads by up to 80 kg/m². Each EPS roof block replaces 4 clay bricks, saving rebar steel and concrete.

items.q: Which regions of Peru do you serve?
items.a: Our plant is located in Chiclayo (Av. Lora y Lora 2370, José Leonardo Ortiz) and we serve all of northern and northeastern Peru: Lambayeque, La Libertad, Piura, Tumbes, Cajamarca, Amazonas and San Martín.

items.q: Is the material virgin or recycled?
items.a: All our products are made from 100% virgin expanded polystyrene, guaranteeing uniform density and certified thermal performance.

contact.body: Our team of sales engineers is ready to provide personalized technical advice.

blog.ctaBody: Talk to our sales engineers about densities, sizes and delivery to your site.
